# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Generate cache keys
        id: cache-keys
        run: |
          echo "node-modules-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "node-modules-restore-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pip-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pip-restore-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-restore-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "config-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('**/config/**', '**/.env.example') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            ~/.yarn/cache
            ~/.pnpm-store
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.node-modules-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.node-modules-restore-key }}

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
          elif [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
            npm install -g pnpm
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
          fi

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            ~/.local/lib/python${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}/site-packages
            venv
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.pip-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.pip-restore-key }}

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "Pipfile" ]; then
            pip install pipenv
            pipenv install --deploy --system
          fi
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install poetry
            poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi
          fi

      - name: Cache environment-specific configuration
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: config-cache
        with:
          path: |
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            dist/config
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.config-key }}

      - name: Generate environment configuration
        if: steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          mkdir -p config/${{ matrix.environment }}
          mkdir -p dist/config
          if [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
            cp .env.example .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
          fi
          echo "Environment: ${{ matrix.environment }}" > config/${{ matrix.environment }}/info.txt
          echo "Generated at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" >> config/${{ matrix.environment }}/info.txt

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: build-cache
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            out
            target
            .cache
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.build-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.build-restore-key }}

      - name: Build project
        if: steps.build-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
          CI: true
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            if grep -q "\"build\"" package.json; then
              npm run build
            fi
          fi

      - name: Cache test results
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            coverage
            .pytest_cache
            .jest_cache
            test-results
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-test-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-test-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Run tests
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then
            npm test -- --coverage --maxWorkers=2
          fi
          if [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
            pytest --cov --cov-report=xml --cov-report=html
          fi

      - name: Cache linter results
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            .ruff_cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-lint-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.js', '**/*.ts', '**/*.py') }}

      - name: Run linters
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q "\"lint\"" package.json; then
            npm run lint
          fi
          if command -v ruff &> /dev/null; then
            ruff check .
          elif command -v flake8 &> /dev/null; then
            flake8 .
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          path: |
            dist
            build
            coverage
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Cache summary
        run: |
          echo "### Cache Status for ${{ matrix.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Cache Type | Status |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|------------|--------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Node Modules | ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Pip Packages | ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Build Output | ${{ steps.build-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Configuration | ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

  cleanup-old-caches:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup-and-cache
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup old caches
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const caches = await github.rest.actions.getActionsCacheList({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              per_page: 100
            });
            
            const now = new Date();
            const maxAge = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
            
            for (const cache of caches.data.actions_caches) {
              const cacheAge = now - new Date(cache.created_at);
              if (cacheAge > maxAge) {
                console.log(`Deleting cache: ${cache.key}`);
                await github.rest.actions.deleteActionsCacheById({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  cache_id: cache.id
                });
              }
            }
